## Description

Describe the changes and why they are needed.

## Related Issue

Closes #(issue-number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/CD or tooling

## How Has This Been Tested?

Describe the tests you ran and their results.

## Checklist

- [ ] Shell scripts use `set -euo pipefail`
- [ ] Resources are idempotent (check existence before creating)
- [ ] Validations are added after each resource creation
- [ ] Variables are sourced from `.env` via `load_env`
- [ ] I have tested the changes against LocalStack or AWS
